description: Known Border Control Posts (BCPs) at EU entry points. The second language of the EHC is determined by the BCP entry point country (I.16), NOT the destination country (I.9). Always use the BCP-specific authority name in reports — never use 'SIVEP' for a non-French BCP.

entries.name: Calais
entries.notes: Primary BCP for UK-France road freight. SIVEP is the only French border authority — do not use 'SIVEP' label for any other BCP.

entries.name: Esbjerg
entries.notes: Primary BCP for Immingham–Esbjerg tanker route. Liquid WPC certified as Ambient on this route by agreement regardless of product temperature.

entries.name: Rosslare
entries.notes: English only — no second language required. 5-page EHC.

entries.name: Dublin
entries.notes: Code TBC. English only — no second language required.

entries.name: Belfast
entries.notes: English only — no second language required. 5-page EHC. XI ISO code treated as within EU for trading purposes.

entries.name: Rotterdam
entries.notes: Dutch language currently optional — single English also accepted.

entries.name: Zeebrugge
entries.notes: Belgium may require French or Dutch depending on BCP location.
